proposal1.heroHeadline: Structure is burning $100,000 a year on inefficient proposal generation. Here is exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting a branded proposal takes days. Now, generate a complete one in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each of these is a silent drain on Structure's resources.

problems.title: Time-Intensive Drafting
problems.description: Every hour spent writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. With 23 team members, this adds up to over 500 hours annually.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manual proposals risk brand inconsistencies, costing potential deals. Over a year, these missed opportunities can mean losing $50,000 in revenue.

problems.title: High Error Rate
problems.description: Human errors in proposals can undermine trust. Correcting these errors costs Structure an estimated $10,000 annually.

problems.title: Delayed Turnaround
problems.description: Slow proposal responses can lose client interest. For Structure, this delay risks losing $30,000 in potential contracts each year.

problems.title: Resource Drain
problems.description: Senior team members are stuck in proposal creation. This misallocation of resources costs Structure $20,000 in strategic work every year.

problems.title: Lost Competitive Edge
problems.description: Competitors with faster proposal systems capture more clients. This is a direct loss to Structure's market share, valued at $40,000 annually.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI automation system replaces these costly inefficiencies.

solutions.title: Rapid Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take days to draft. With this system, create them in under a minute, freeing up hundreds of hours.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Inconsistent branding loses deals. The AI ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with Structure's brand.

solutions.title: Error-Free Documents
solutions.description: Manual errors damage credibility. The AI generates flawless proposals every time.

solutions.title: Instant Turnaround
solutions.description: Currently, delays lose clients. The system delivers proposals instantly, keeping prospects engaged.

solutions.title: Strategic Resource Allocation
solutions.description: Senior staff waste time on proposals. Now, they focus on strategic growth, not paperwork.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Structure's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Structure around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Structure.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Elevate Acme Corp's Brand Through Innovative Design Solutions
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our engagement will revitalize your brand identity and enhance user interaction, driving greater customer engagement and retention.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing significant revenue losses due to several avoidable issues.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves your site without engaging is lost revenue. Currently, you are losing approximately 30% of potential leads monthly.

problems.title: Weak Brand Presence
problems.description: With an inconsistent brand message, you are missing out on market recognition. This results in an estimated 20% drop in customer loyalty.

problems.title: Suboptimal User Experience
problems.description: Poor site navigation is causing user frustration. This leads to a 25% decrease in repeat visitors.

problems.title: Ineffective Visual Design
problems.description: Outdated design elements are costing you competitive edge. You could be losing 15% of potential conversions.

problems.title: Low Social Media Engagement
problems.description: Inadequate social media strategy results in a 40% lower interaction rate than industry standards.

problems.title: Limited Mobile Optimization
problems.description: With mobile users making up 60% of your traffic, poor mobile design leads to substantial revenue losses.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our proposed solutions are designed to address these critical issues head-on.

solutions.title: Brand Identity Revamp
solutions.description: We will create a cohesive and impactful brand identity that resonates with your target audience. This will enhance market recognition and loyalty.

solutions.title: Website Redesign
solutions.description: A full website redesign will improve user experience and engagement. This will translate into higher conversion rates and customer retention.

solutions.title: Mobile Optimization
solutions.description: Optimizing your mobile site will ensure seamless user interaction, increasing accessibility and driving up conversions.

solutions.title: Social Media Strategy
solutions.description: Developing a targeted social media strategy will increase your engagement and interaction rates, building a stronger community around your brand.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Structure offers a unique blend of creativity and technical expertise.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: Our portfolio showcases successful collaborations with leading tech companies.

whyUsCards.title: Technical Expertise
whyUsCards.description: We bring cutting-edge design solutions that are technically sound and scalable.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: Our team prioritizes your goals, ensuring solutions are tailored to meet your needs.

whyUsCards.title: Innovation-Driven
whyUsCards.description: We constantly explore new ideas to keep your brand ahead of the curve.

proposal2.teamIntro: Our team is dedicated to delivering exceptional results.

team.name: John Galpin
team.bio: John leads strategic initiatives and manages key client relationships, ensuring alignment with business goals.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Research
process.description: We dive deep into understanding your brand and market dynamics.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: We craft a strategy that aligns with your vision and objectives.

process.title: Design & Implementation
process.description: Our team brings your brand to life with innovative design solutions.

process.title: Launch & Optimization
process.description: We launch the new brand elements and continue to optimize for performance.

pricing.name: Basic Engagement
pricing.description: Ideal for companies looking to refresh their brand identity.

pricing.name: Comprehensive Package
pricing.description: Recommended for a full brand overhaul and digital strategy.

pricing.name: Enterprise Solution
pricing.description: For companies seeking extensive design and strategic support.

proposal2.footerSub: Designing the future of tech brands.

We deliver enduring success for our clients, transforming their position in the market.
